title: Lunar Origins
description: A collection of unique Origins, each with their own distinct abilities.
body:
# Lunar Origins
A dynamic collection of unique Origins, each with its own special abilities and playstyle, starting with the Frog Origin and expanding to even more exciting options.

### Frog Origin
Inspired by the swamp's most resilient creatures, the Frog Origin brings agility, amphibious traits, and enhanced movement to your gameplay.

### Femboy Origin
Gracefully light on your feet, the Femboy Origin offers unparalleled stealth and subtlety, allowing for silent movements and enhanced sneaking abilities.

### Shark Origin
Harness the power of the deep sea with the Shark Origin, designed to offer aquatic agility and sharp instincts to those who thrive underwater.

### Requirements:
Origins Mod (required for Origins to work)

Pehkui (required for Frog Origins)
